title: Mobileye: How to Process Data from 70 Million Cars Driving Around the World

description:
Mobileye provides camera based driving assistance solution and data services, based on data collected from 70 million vehicles, driving all over the world. In this episode of This is My Architecture, Ido from Mobileye will walk us through their data collection and analytics system, the evolution of it and how they provide important insights to their customers, based on this data.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture

chapters.title: What Are the Future Plans for Dynamic Ram

fulltitle: Mobileye: How to Process Data from 70 Million Cars Driving Around the World
